news_title: Fusion Fuel’s BrightHy Solutions Expands Green Hydrogen Footprint in Southern Europe with 15 MW Engineering Project
summary: Fusion Fuel Green (NASDAQ: HTOO)has announced that its subsidiary BrightHy Solutions has secured a€275,000 contractto provide engineering services for a green hydrogen production facility in southern Europe. The project involves designing a15 MW facilitythat will produce hydrogen for blending into the natural gas network.BrightHy Solutions will deliver front-end engineering design (FEED) services, including safety and environmental studies, project management, and technical specifications. The project has a16-week timeline, comprising a 4-week preparation period and 12-week delivery period.
